boundary_binding.action_boundary: Requested AP execution may proceed only if current source-control records close the exact boundary for the requested action.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Closed: the control record states the vendor entity must match rail owner and is current, exact, tied to the requested action.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect remains from tone, urgency, or parent-company wording; those are explicitly non-controlling.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current control record is effective now and matches actor, scope, effective date, and system boundary; dependency is satisfied.

critical_features_preserved: communication text does not override control records
vendor entity must match rail owner
final_answer: The exact current source records close the action boundary. The controlling record says the vendor entity must match rail owner and is current, exact, tied to the requested action. Policy also states execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact requested action boundary, which they do here. The parent-company relationship and risky tone are non-controlling context, not blockers.
